012221211200201000111102202 - ASI: 21

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  010 = 01 * 0
  012 = 01 * 2
  110 = 11 * 0
  211 = 2 * 11
  221 = 22 * 1
  0011 = 00 * 11
  2002 = 20 * 02
  2202 = 22 * 02
  012221 = 012 * 221
  0100011 = 010 * 0011
  1102202 = 110 * 2202
  2112002 = 211 * 2002
  0122212112002 = 012221 * 2112002
  01000111102202 = 0100011 * 1102202
  012221211200201000111102202 = 0122212112002 * 01000111102202
